name: Three Color Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large package of three color pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in olive oil and chop.
2. Boil the pasta according to package directions and cool.
3. In a large bowl, toss together the avocados, Mozzarella cheese, tomatoes or red peppers, almonds, basil, salt, pepper, and black olives.
4. Add the cooked pasta and chopped chicken to the bowl with the dressing. Mix gently until well combined.
VARIATIONS: Add ham, shrimp, chives, or no meat at all.
